color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🧹 1. Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
└ Fetch latest code from main branch
2. Setup Node (actions/setup-node@v4)
└ Install Node v20 & npm cache
3. Install (npm ci)
└ Download dependencies
4. Lint Check (npx eslint .)
└ Check code syntax & style rules

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🏷️ 1. Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
└ Fetch latest code from main branch
2. Setup Node (actions/setup-node@v4)
└ Install Node v20 & npm cache
3. Install (npm ci)
└ Download dependencies
4. Type Check (npx tsc --noEmit)
└ Strict TypeScript type checking

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🧪 1. Checkout (actions/checkout@v4)
└ Fetch latest code from main branch
2. Setup Node (actions/setup-node@v4)
└ Install Node v20 & npm cache
3. Install (npm ci)
└ Download dependencies
4. Unit Tests (npm run test:coverage)
└ Run Vitest component testing

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🗄️ 1. Checkout & Setup Node
└ Prepare environment
2. Install (npm ci)
└ Download dependencies
3. Connect Test Database
└ Load DATABASE_URL from Secrets
4. DB Migration (npx drizzle-kit push)
└ Push new schema to Neon Database

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤖 1. Checkout, Setup Node & Install
└ Prepare environment
2. Build App (npm run build)
└ Build Next.js for production
3. Install Browsers (playwright install)
└ Download Chrome/Firefox
4. E2E Tests (npx playwright test)
└ Run automated UI testing bots
5. Upload Artifact (actions/upload-artifact@v4)
└ Save test reports & videos
